steps.instruction: Ensure the Branch TestBed app is open on its main screen. If you see buttons like 'Create Branch Link', 'Create QR Code', you are already on the main screen. If you are on a different screen (e.g. a log screen, a dialog, or any other app), press Back repeatedly until you reach the main screen, or go to the device home screen, then find and open the 'Branch-SDK-TestBed' app.
Tap on the button that says exactly 'Create QR Code'. Do not scroll.

Wait up to 5 seconds for a dialog with the title 'Your QR Code' to appear on the screen. The dialog should contain a QR code image and a 'Dismiss' button. If the dialog is visible, succeed. If not, fail the test.
